members.label: refrigerator
members.description: stainless steel refrigerator in kitchen back-left
members.long_form_open_description: Tall stainless steel refrigerator with side-by-side or French-door configuration, located along the back kitchen wall among the dark wood cabinets. Reflective surfaces catch light from the kitchen.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Left of the kitchen island and integrated with the cabinet run
